codeReview.summary: This follow-up packet turns the Lane 08 strategy into an explicit contract instead of prose only: `testing/local/confidence-lanes.json` and `validate_confidence_lanes.py` require all five decision points, the eight-item deployable checklist, and quarantine metadata/classification rules, then each relevant workflow script invokes the validator before claiming success. The changes stay inside governance/testing surfaces, tighten fail-closed behavior in `check_flaky_tags.py`, and preserve the intended packet split by leaving the missing catalog restoration to a dedicated follow-up feature rather than broadening this change set.

summary: PASS. The second Lane 08 packet codifies the confidence-by-lane and deployable-state contract, enforces broken-test classification metadata, and wires that contract into local, PR, main, and staging workflows without scope creep.
